  "claims": [
    "COVID-19 has resulted in over 50,000 deaths and over 3.5 million cases in California.",
    "Safe in-person instruction provides education and social development that cannot be achieved through remote learning.",
    "Assembly Bill 86 is based on data and science to facilitate the safe return of students to classrooms.",
    "The Safe Schools for All Plan will provide billions of dollars for COVID-19 testing, protective equipment, and safety upgrades at schools.",
    "The plan ensures that teachers and staff are prioritized for vaccine doses.",
